mapper.insert: insert into diary( user_id, title, content, date, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId},#{title},#{content},#{date},#{createdAt},#{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from diary where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, date, created_at, updated_at FROM diary WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY date DESC, id DESC
